El <strong>Production Analyzer</strong>: The Production Analyzer analyzes the production configuration in SAP IBP and exports an Excel workbook with up to 9 sheets. Each sheet examines a different entity from the perspective of its completeness and consistency for planning.
El análisis cruza diez entidades: Produc: The analysis cross-references ten entities: Production Source Header (PSH), Production Source Item (PSI), Production Source Resource (PSR), Resource, Resource Location, Product, Location, Location Product and Location Source. Findings are always expressed in terms of what is missing or misconfigured relative to what IBP needs to plan correctly.
<strong>Hojas condicionales:</strong> La: Conditional sheets: The Product, Location, Resource, Resource Location, Prod Source Item and Prod Source Resource sheets are only created if the user selected the corresponding entity before running the analysis. The Excluded Types sheet only appears if material types were excluded from the main analysis. The Summary sheet is always generated.
<strong>Importante:</strong> Los resulta: Important: Results depend on the material type categorization (MATTYPEID). The same finding can be ⛔ Alert for a Finished Product and not apply for a Raw Material. See the Material Types section.
Problema crítico que bloquea o distorsio: Critical issue that blocks or distorts planning in IBP. Requires action before running any plan.
Dato incompleto o sospechoso que convien: Incomplete or suspicious data worth reviewing. Does not block IBP but may produce incorrect results.
Todas las validaciones aplicables pasaro: All applicable validations passed. The record is correctly configured.
El dato no aplica para este registro (N/: The field does not apply for this record (N/A). Cell shown with light gray background and italic. Does not indicate an error, just absence of data for that field.
Primera hoja del libro. Una fila por cad: First sheet of the workbook. One row per analyzed sheet. Lets you see overall configuration health at a glance.
Sheet number in the Excel workbook.
Nombre de la hoja analizada (Product, Lo: Name of the analyzed sheet (Product, Location, Resource, etc.).
Cantidad de filas procesadas. Ej: 350 =: Number of processed rows. Ex: 350 = 350 products analyzed.
Registros con problema crítico que bloqu: Records with critical issues that block or distort planning.
Registros con dato incompleto o sospecho: Records with incomplete or suspicious data worth reviewing.
Registros sin hallazgos — todas las vali: Records with no findings — all applicable validations passed.
Porcentaje de registros OK sobre el tota: Percentage of OK records over the total. Formula: OK / Total × 100. A sheet with 85% consistency has 15% of its records with findings.
<strong>Lectura recomendada:</strong> Co: Recommended reading: Start with the sheet having the lowest Consistency % and the highest number of 🔴 Alerts. That indicates where the most critical planning problems are.
Una fila por cada producto del maestro d: One row per product in the SAP IBP material master. This sheet validates whether each product has the minimum configuration needed for IBP to plan it correctly.
⛔ Alerta / ⚠ Advertencia / ✅ OK. El peor: ⛔ Alert / ⚠ Warning / ✅ OK. The worst finding of the product determines the row color.
Texto detallado de todos los hallazgos e: Detailed text of all findings, separated by |. If status is OK, describes which validations passed.
Unique product code in SAP IBP.

<strong>Productos sin categoría:</strong: Uncategorized products: Material types without an assigned category receive all validations at ⚠ Warning severity. Their observations are prefixed with Uncategorized [MATTYPEID]. If there are no findings, they show Uncategorized [MATTYPEID] — no findings in permissive mode with status ✅ OK. Assigning the correct category enables the corresponding strict validations.
El producto no está registrado en ningun: The product is not registered in any location in Location Product.

Sin arco de abastecimiento hacia: X, Y: No supply arc to: X, Y

Crear arco(s) en Location Source con el: Create Location Source arc(s) with the supplier as LOCFR and the consuming plant as LOCID for each uncovered input.
Sin arco de abastecimiento (no registrad: No supply arc (not registered in Location Source)

Configurar Location Source con el provee: Configure Location Source with the supplier or source plant as LOCFR to the consuming plant(s).
El producto de tipo Mercadería no tiene: The Trading-type product has no distribution arcs in Location Source.

Sí/No — ¿La ubicación está habilitada en: Yes/No — Is the location enabled in Location Product? Without this, IBP does not plan at that location.

Una fila por cada fuente de producción (: One row per production source (SOURCEID) in SAP IBP. Each SOURCEID represents a recipe that transforms inputs into a finished or semi-finished product at a specific plant.
Identificador único de la receta de prod: Unique identifier of the production recipe.
Producto que produce esta receta (output: Product produced by this recipe (main output).

Antes de ejecutar el análisis, el usuari: Before running the analysis, the user assigns each MATTYPEID to one or more categories. This categorization determines which validations apply and the severity of the findings. The same missing data can be ⛔ Alert for a Finished product and not generate any finding for a Raw Material.
Si no se asigna ninguna categoría, el an: If no category is assigned, the analysis applies rules in "permissive mode" (everything is marked at most ⚠ Warning) and may hide real critical problems. It is always recommended to categorize before interpreting the results.
El <strong>Network Analyzer</strong> exa: The Network Analyzer examines the complete SAP IBP logistics network: plants, distribution centers, customers, transfer arcs (Location Source) and delivery arcs (Customer Source). For each product, it builds the network graph and detects topological anomalies.
El Excel de salida tiene 6 hojas: Resume: The output Excel has 6 sheets: Summary, Product, Location, Customer, Location Source and Customer Source. Each sheet analyzes the entity from the perspective of connectivity, lead times and enablement in Location Product.
<strong>Importante:</strong> Al igual qu: Important: As in Production Analyzer, findings depend on the material type categorization. A Finished product that does not reach any customer generates ⛔ Alert; the same problem in a Semi-finished may not generate an alert because it is not expected to reach the customer directly. See the Material Types section.
<strong>Auto-split:</strong> Si una hoja: Auto-split: If a sheet exceeds 900,000 rows, the analyzer creates additional sheets with the same name and a numeric suffix: Product (2), Product (3), etc. Columns are identical across all sheets in the same group.
Primera hoja del libro. Una fila por cad: First sheet of the workbook. One row per analyzed sheet. Lets you see overall logistics network health at a glance.
Nombre de la hoja analizada (Product, Lo: Name of the analyzed sheet (Product, Location, Customer, Location Source, Customer Source).
Cantidad de filas procesadas en esa hoja: Number of processed rows in that sheet.
Registros con problema crítico de conect: Records with critical connectivity or configuration issues.
Porcentaje de registros OK sobre el tota: Percentage of OK records over the total. Formula: OK / Total × 100.
<strong>Lectura recomendada:</strong> Co: Recommended reading: Start with the Product sheet, which concentrates the most important connectivity findings. Then review Location to identify critical nodes and finally Location Source / Customer Source for arcs with lead time or configuration issues.
Una fila por cada producto presente en l: One row per product present in the network (Location Source, Customer Source, PSH or Location Product). This sheet is the heart of the analysis: it builds the complete network graph for each product and detects connectivity anomalies.
Una fila por cada cliente detectado en l: One row per customer detected in the network (Customer Source or Customer Product). Analyzes whether each customer can receive products through complete routes from production.
Unique customer code in SAP IBP.
Una fila por cada arco de transferencia: One row per transfer arc in Location Source (PRDID + LOCFR + LOCID combination). Analyzes whether each arc has a defined lead time, whether the endpoint nodes are enabled in Location Product, and whether the arc is part of a complete route.
Una fila por cada arco de entrega a clie: One row per customer delivery arc in Customer Source (PRDID + LOCID + CUSTID combination). Analyzes whether each delivery has a defined lead time, whether the endpoints are enabled, and whether a complete supply route exists.
<strong>Lectura clave:</strong> Los arco: Key reading: Arcs with Reachable Delivery = No indicate the customer has delivery arcs configured but production never reaches that point — there is a gap in the distribution network.
La categorización de MATTYPEID afecta di: MATTYPEID categorization directly affects which findings are generated and their severity in the Network Analyzer Product sheet. The same lack of route to customer can be ⛔ Alert for a Finished product and not generate any finding for a Semi-finished.
<strong>Tipo excluido:</strong> Los prod: Excluded type: Excluded products do not generate rows in the Network Analyzer Product sheet. However, if they are PSI components of included products, their supply arcs are validated in the consumer product’s Product sheet.
<strong>Sin categoría (uncategorized):</: Uncategorized: All available validations are executed — it is the most complete mode, equivalent to Finished. The Network Status is determined by what is present in the data: if it has PSH, it is evaluated as Finished; if it has PSI without PSH, as input. Any detected anomaly generates ⛔ Alert just like a Finished product. It is recommended to categorize materials to obtain accurate findings according to the actual product role.

Esta ubicación recibe insumos o semiterm: This location receives inputs or semi-finished but has no production recipe — the inputs arrive without declared productive use.
Verificar si esta ubicación debería tene: Verify whether this location should have production configured or whether the supply arcs are incorrect.
Ubicación en maestro sin actividad en ot: Location in master without activity in other data
La ubicación existe en el maestro pero n: The location exists in the master but does not appear in any network entity (PSH, Location Source, Customer Source, Location Product).
Verificar si la ubicación es obsoleta y: Check if the location is obsolete and can be removed from the master, or if its network participation is missing.
BOMs con PSI, PSR y lead time | Sin comp: BOMs with PSI, PSR and lead time | No uncovered components | No idle resources
Planta completamente configurada: todas: Fully configured plant: all recipes have BOM, resources and lead time; all inputs have coverage; no unused resources.
Abastecimiento con consumo PSI y cobertu: Supply with PSI consumption and LP coverage at destination
Todos los productos que esta ubicación e: All products this location sends are consumed as PSI at the destination plants and are enabled in Location Product.
Distribuye N producto(s) terminado(s)/me: Distributes N finished/trading product(s) without findings
Nodo de transferencia que redistribuye p: Transfer node that redistributes finished or trading products without detected anomalies.
La ubicación actúa como nodo de transfer: The location acts as a transfer node and no configuration problems were detected in the products it redistributes.
Recibe N producto(s) | Location Product: Receives N product(s) | Location Product OK | No components without production
Nodo receptor correctamente configurado:: Correctly configured receiver node: all received products are enabled in Location Product and no input arrives at a location without associated production.
La ubicación solo recibe productos y no: The location only receives products and no configuration problems were detected.
La ubicación tiene actividad en la red y: The location has activity in the network and no configuration anomalies were detected.
Sí/No — ¿Este recurso está asignado a al: Yes/No — Is this resource assigned to at least one production source in Production Source Resource? If No, IBP never uses it for capacity planning.
Sí/No — ¿Este recurso tiene al menos una: Yes/No — Does this resource have at least one plant configured in Resource Location? If No, IBP does not know where it physically operates.
Número de plantas donde este recurso tie: Number of plants where this resource has Resource Location configured.
Códigos de las plantas donde está config: Codes of the plants where the resource is configured.
Número de SOURCEIDs a los que está asign: Number of SOURCEIDs to which this resource is assigned via PSR.
Códigos de los SOURCEIDs a los que está: Codes of the SOURCEIDs to which this resource is assigned.
Número de productos distintos que este r: Number of distinct products this resource helps to produce.
Códigos de los productos que produce est: Codes of the products produced by this resource.
El recurso existe en el maestro pero no: The resource exists in the master but appears neither in PSR nor in Resource Location — completely disconnected from the production configuration.
Verificar si el recurso es obsoleto y pu: Check if the resource is obsolete and can be removed from the master, or if it is missing assignment to recipes (PSR) and to its plant (Resource Location).
El recurso tiene planta asignada en Reso: The resource has a plant assigned in Resource Location but no recipe uses it. IBP has the resource located but never considers it for capacity planning.
Asignar el recurso a al menos una receta: Assign the resource to at least one recipe (SOURCEID) via Production Source Resource, or check if it is obsolete.
El recurso participa en recetas (PSR) pe: The resource participates in recipes (PSR) but has no plant configured in Resource Location. IBP does not know in which plant it physically operates.
Agregar la combinación RESID+LOCID corre: Add the corresponding RESID+LOCID combination in Resource Location in IBP.
El recurso está activo en al menos una r: The resource is active in at least one recipe and has its plant correctly configured.
Una fila por cada combinación Recurso +: One row per Resource + Plant combination configured in Resource Location. Validates whether each combination is actually being used in some production recipe.
Código de la planta donde está configura: Code of the plant where this resource is configured.
Sí/No — ¿Esta combinación aparece en al: Yes/No — Does this combination appear in at least one active Production Source Resource? If No, the resource is in the plant master but does not participate in any recipe.
Recurso activo en PSR para esta planta: Resource active in PSR for this plant
La combinación RESID+LOCID está en uso e: The RESID+LOCID combination is in use in at least one production recipe at that plant.
Recurso asignado a planta pero sin uso e: Resource assigned to plant but unused in PSR for this plant
El recurso está en el maestro de la plan: The resource is in the plant master (Resource Location) but no active recipe uses it at that plant. IBP knows it but never considers it for capacity planning at that site.
Verificar si el recurso es obsoleto para: Check if the resource is obsolete for that plant and can be removed from Resource Location, or if it is missing assignment to some recipe (PSR) at that plant.
P = fuente primaria (output principal) |: P = primary source (main output) | C = co-product (by-product of the same process). A recipe can have both P and C simultaneously.
Lead time de producción en días. 0 o vac: Production lead time in days. 0 or empty → IBP plans instantaneous production (⛔).
Unidades del producto terminado por corr: Finished product units per production run. Affects the calculation of how many runs are needed to cover demand.
Proporción asignada a esta fuente cuando: Share assigned to this source when multiple SOURCEIDs exist for the same product+plant. IBP uses this value to distribute demand among recipes. Empty = single source or no quota defined.
Sí/No — ¿Esta combinación producto+plant: Yes/No — Is this product+plant combination enabled in Location Product? Without this, the recipe exists but IBP does not activate it.
Ingredientes definidos en el BOM. 0 = BO: Ingredients defined in the BOM. 0 = empty BOM → IBP does not plan input purchasing.
Recursos asignados a esta receta. 0 = si: Resources assigned to this recipe. 0 = no modeled capacity.
Códigos de los recursos asignados a esta: Codes of the resources assigned to this recipe via Production Source Resource.
Ingredientes marcados como material de r: Ingredients marked as alternative material (ISALTITEM=X). Useful to know the BOM substitution flexibility.
Sí/No — resumen directo de si la receta: Yes/No — direct summary of whether the recipe has at least one resource assigned in Production Source Resource.
La receta no tiene ningún ingrediente de: The recipe has no defined ingredient. IBP does not generate input demand for this product.
Cargar los componentes (PSI) necesarios: Load the required components (PSI) in the BOM of the indicated SOURCEID in IBP.
El lead time de producción es cero o est: The production lead time is zero or empty. IBP plans as if the product were manufactured instantaneously, generating incorrect delivery dates.
Ingresar el lead time real de producción: Enter the real production lead time (in days) in the PLEADTIME field of the Production Source Header in IBP.
PRDID+LOCID sin cobertura en Location Pr: PRDID+LOCID without coverage in Location Product
La combinación producto+planta de esta r: The product+plant combination of this recipe is not enabled in Location Product. The recipe exists but IBP does not use it for planning.
Habilitar la combinación PRDID+LOCID en: Enable the PRDID+LOCID combination in Location Product in IBP.
La receta no tiene ningún recurso produc: The recipe has no production resource assigned. IBP cannot evaluate capacity constraints for this recipe.
Asignar al menos un recurso (RESID) a es: Assign at least one resource (RESID) to this SOURCEID via Production Source Resource in IBP.
La receta no tiene un registro con SOURC: The recipe has no record with SOURCETYPE=P — only has co-products (C). It has no defined main output.
Revisar la configuración del SOURCEID y: Review the SOURCEID configuration and add the record with SOURCETYPE=P for the main product.
Múltiples SOURCEIDs para mismo PRDID+LOC: Multiple SOURCEIDs for same PRDID+LOCID — verify quotas
Hay más de una receta para el mismo prod: There is more than one recipe for the same product at the same plant. IBP needs PRATIO defined to correctly distribute demand among sources.
Revisar que los SOURCEIDs indicados teng: Verify that the indicated SOURCEIDs have PRATIO defined and that the sum of quotas is consistent with the production strategy.
BOM con componentes PSI | Lead time defi: BOM with PSI components | Lead time defined | Enabled in LP | SOURCETYPE=P present | PSR resources assigned
Una fila por cada componente (ingredient: One row per component (ingredient) in the BOM of a production recipe. Validates that each ingredient has a defined coefficient and a supply arc configured.
Receta a la que pertenece este component: Recipe to which this component belongs.
Material que se consume como ingrediente: Material consumed as an ingredient in this recipe.
Tipo de material del componente. Determi: Material type of the component. Determines whether it is treated as semi-finished or external input.
Unidades del componente consumidas por u: Component units consumed per unit of finished product. If 0, IBP does not plan the purchase of this input.
Semielaborado = se fabrica en la misma p: Semi-finished = manufactured at the same plant (has its own PSH there) | Semi-finished (ext.) = manufactured at another plant (PSH at a different plant) | Semi-finished (no recipe) = categorized as semi but with no active PSH at any plant | Input = must arrive from outside via Location Source | Undetermined = could not be classified with the available information.
Sí/No — ¿El componente está habilitado e: Yes/No — Is the component enabled in Location Product for this plant? Without this, IBP cannot plan its consumption here.
Sí/No — ¿Hay arco de Location Source que: Yes/No — Is there a Location Source arc bringing this input to this plant? Shows N/A for semi-finished (produced locally).
Código(s) de las ubicaciones de origen e: Code(s) of the source locations in Location Source for this component at this plant.
Número de ubicaciones distintas que abas: Number of distinct locations supplying this component to this plant.
Códigos de todas las ubicaciones origen: Codes of all source locations for this component+plant.
X = este componente puede sustituir a ot: X = this component can substitute another alternative material. Empty = main component without configured substitution.
Código del componente principal al que e: Code of the main component this material can replace (only when ISALTITEM=X).
El coeficiente de consumo del componente: The component consumption coefficient is zero or empty. IBP does not plan the purchase of this input even if it is in the BOM.
Revisar y corregir el COMPONENTCOEFFICIE: Review and fix the COMPONENTCOEFFICIENT in the Production Source Item in IBP.
Semiterminado sin arco de transferencia: Semi-finished without transfer arc to this plant
El componente es un semiterminado catego: The component is a semi-finished categorized as such (semi MATTYPEID) with production at another plant, but there is no Location Source arc moving it to this consuming plant.
Crear arco en Location Source con la pla: Create a Location Source arc with the semi-finished producing plant as LOCFR and this plant as LOCID for the indicated component.
Insumo sin arco de abastecimiento en Loc: Input without supply arc in Location Source
El componente es un insumo externo (no s: The component is an external input (not semi-finished) but there is no Location Source arc bringing it to this plant.
Crear arco en Location Source con el pro: Create a Location Source arc with the supplier as LOCFR and this plant as LOCID for the indicated component.
Componente no habilitado en Location Pro: Component not enabled in Location Product for this plant
El componente no está registrado en Loca: The component is not registered in Location Product for the plant where it is consumed. IBP cannot plan its consumption here.
Habilitar la combinación componente+plan: Enable the component+plant combination in Location Product in IBP.
El SOURCEID de este componente no existe: The SOURCEID of this component does not exist in the downloaded Production Source Header. It may be orphan data or a data filter excluding the parent PSH.
Verificar que el PSH del SOURCEID indica: Verify that the PSH of the indicated SOURCEID exists and is active in IBP with the same Planning Area and Version.
Semiterminado sin receta de produccion (: Semi-finished without production recipe (PSH) at any plant
El componente está categorizado como sem: The component is categorized as semi-finished (semi MATTYPEID) but no active Production Source Header was found for this material at any plant of the analyzed Planning Area and Version.
Verificar que exista un PSH activo para: Verify that an active PSH exists for this semi-finished in IBP with the correct Planning Area and Version. If the PSH is in another Planning Area, review the production hierarchy configuration.
Material de reemplazo sin registro en It: Alternative material without record in Item Sub
El componente está marcado como ISALTITE: The component is marked as ISALTITEM=X (substitute) but has no record in Production Source Item Sub linking it to the material it replaces.
Completar la configuración del sustituto: Complete the substitute configuration in Production Source Item Sub in IBP.
Componente de tipo excluido ([MATTYPE]): Component of excluded type ([MATTYPE]) — validated in context
El componente pertenece a un tipo de mat: The component belongs to a material type excluded from the main analysis. Its coefficient and supply coverage are validated because it is an ingredient of an included product.
Si el insumo tiene brechas de cobertura,: If the input has coverage gaps, review in IBP even if its type is excluded from the general analysis.
El componente es un semiterminado que se: The component is a semi-finished manufactured at this same plant — it is tracked via its own PSH.
Sin acción requerida. No requiere arco d: No action required. It does not require a Location Source arc because it is produced locally.
Semiterminado producido en otra planta:: Semi-finished produced at another plant: transfer configured
El componente es un semiterminado catego: The component is a semi-finished categorized as such (semi MATTYPEID) with production at another plant and a Location Source arc configured to move it to this consuming plant.
Sin acción requerida. La transferencia e: No action required. The transfer is correctly configured.
SOURCEID valido en PSH | Coeficiente def: Valid SOURCEID in PSH | Coefficient defined | With supply arc in Location Source | Enabled in Location Product
Una fila por cada asignación Recurso + R: One row per Resource + Recipe assignment (RESID + SOURCEID) in Production Source Resource. Validates that the resource assigned to a recipe also has a plant configuration in Resource Location.
Receta de producción a la que está asign: Production recipe to which the resource is assigned.
Sí/No — ¿Esta combinación recurso+planta: Yes/No — Does this resource+plant combination exist in Resource Location? If No, there is an inconsistency: the resource operates in a recipe at that plant but does not appear in that plant master.
Códigos de las plantas donde este recurs: Codes of the plants where this resource has Resource Location configured.
Recurso en producción sin asignación en: Resource in production without assignment in Resource Location for plant X
El recurso está asignado a una receta de: The resource is assigned to a recipe at plant X but has no Resource Location configured for that plant. IBP registers the resource use in the recipe but does not formally recognize it at that site.
Agregar la combinación RESID+LOCID en Re: Add the RESID+LOCID combination in Resource Location in IBP to formalize the resource assignment to that plant.
El SOURCEID del PSR no existe en el Prod: The PSR SOURCEID does not exist in the Production Source Header — orphan data.
Verificar que el PSH del SOURCEID exista: Verify that the PSH of the SOURCEID exists and is active in IBP.
Recurso X asignado en Resource Location: Resource X assigned in Resource Location for plant Y | Associated with SOURCEID Z
La asignación recurso+planta es consiste: The resource+plant assignment is consistent between PSR and Resource Location.
Solo aparece si el usuario excluyó algún: Only appears if the user excluded some material type before running the analysis. One row per excluded MATTYPEID. Even if a type is excluded from the main analysis, its products continue to be validated in context if they appear as components in the BOM of included products.
Code of the excluded material type.
Cuántos productos del maestro tienen est: How many products in the master have this type.
Aparece como componente PSI en # SOURCEI: Appears as PSI component in # SOURCEIDs
Cuántas recetas distintas usan productos: How many distinct recipes use products of this type as an ingredient. Even if the type is excluded, its supply configuration is validated when it is a component.
SOURCEIDs donde es componente (códigos): SOURCEIDs where it is a component (codes)
Códigos de las recetas que usan producto: Codes of the recipes that use products of this type as a PSI component.
Cuántas combinaciones componente+planta: How many component+plant combinations (of this excluded type) DO have a Location Source arc configured.
How many component+plant combinations (of this excluded type) DO NOT have a Location Source arc. If > 0, there are inputs without an arrival route to the plant consuming them.
Texto descriptivo del estado: indica si: Descriptive status text: indicates whether the type appears as a component and whether there are supply gaps.
Excluido del análisis principal. Validad: Excluded from the main analysis. Validated as a component in N production source(s).
El tipo de material está excluido del an: The material type is excluded from the main analysis but its products appear as PSI components in N distinct recipes of included products. They are validated in context.
Sin acción requerida si la exclusión es: No action required if the exclusion is intentional. Review the LocSrc coverage columns to confirm the components have supply arcs configured.
Excluido del análisis principal. No apar: Excluded from the main analysis. Does not appear as a component in any production source.
El tipo está excluido y ninguno de sus p: The type is excluded and none of its products appears as a PSI component of included products. It does not actively participate in the analysis.
Sin acción requerida. La fila se incluye: No action required. The row is included as a record of the exclusion and its null impact on other BOMs.
⚠ N combinación(es) componente-planta si: ⚠ N component-plant combination(s) without supply arc.
Sufijo que se concatena a la observación: Suffix concatenated to the observation when there are products of the excluded type acting as components without a Location Source arc to the plant where they are consumed.
Configurar el arco de Location Source pa: Configure the Location Source arc for the component+plant combinations without coverage, or review whether the type exclusion is really appropriate.
Un tipo excluido que actúa como componen: An excluded type acting as a PSI component of included products is validated anyway. Exclusion only skips the main analysis of products of that type, not their validation as an ingredient in other BOMs.
Producto fabricado internamente. Requier: Product manufactured internally. Requires complete configuration for production and distribution planning.
Planta productora no es origen en Locati: Producing plant is not a source in Location Source → ⛔ Alert
Componente fabricado internamente que al: Component manufactured internally that feeds another process. Does not reach the customer directly.
Consume en planta productora → ✅ OK (sin: Consumed at producing plant → ✅ OK (no transfer required)
Transfiere sin consumo en destino → ⛔ Al: Transferred without consumption at destination → ⛔ Alert
No aplica detección de Ghost Nodes ni De: Ghost Node and Dead-end detection does not apply (does not need to reach the customer)
Ítem adquirido externamente. No se fabri: Item acquired externally. It is not manufactured nor transformed internally.
No requiere PSH, PSI ni PSR: Does not require PSH, PSI or PSR
Debe tener arco de proveedor en Location: Must have a supplier arc in Location Source → if missing = ⛔ Alert
No se evalúa PLEADTIME ni ruta a cliente: PLEADTIME and route to customer are not evaluated
Tener PSH es inusual → ⚠ Advertencia de: Having PSH is unusual → ⚠ Categorization warning
Producto comprado y revendido sin transf: Product purchased and resold without internal transformation.
Debe tener Location Source y Customer So: Must have Location Source and Customer Source → with neither = ⚠ Warning
<strong>Multi-categoría:</strong> Un MAT: Multi-category: A MATTYPEID can belong to more than one category. In that case, the most permissive rule is applied: if Finished requires ⛔ and Semi-finished requires ⚠, the result is ⚠.
⛔ / ⚠ / ✅ según el hallazgo más grave en: ⛔ / ⚠ / ✅ depending on the most severe finding.
Detalle de todos los hallazgos o, si est: Detail of all findings or, if OK, description of which validations passed.
Tipo de material SAP. Determina qué regl: SAP material type. Determines which analysis rules are applied.
¿El producto tiene al menos una fuente d: Does the product have at least one production source (PSH)?
¿El producto aparece como componente en: Does the product appear as a component in any recipe?
¿Tiene arcos de transferencia entre ubic: Does it have transfer arcs between locations?
¿Tiene arcos de entrega a algún cliente?: Does it have delivery arcs to any customer?
¿Está habilitado en Location Product en: Is it enabled in Location Product in at least one location?
¿Está habilitado en Customer Product par: Is it enabled in Customer Product for any customer?
Sí = el producto solo existe en el maest: Yes = the product only exists in the material master with no network activity. Indicates an orphan product.
Clasificación sintética de la situación: Synthetic classification of the product logistics situation. See states table below.
Número de plantas que producen este prod: Number of plants that produce this product (have PSH).
Número de centros de distribución o nodo: Number of distribution centers or intermediate nodes that handle this product in Location Source without being producing plants.
Número de clientes que reciben este prod: Number of customers that receive this product via Customer Source.
Cantidad de rutas planta-a-cliente encon: Number of plant-to-customer routes found. 0 = the product does not reach any customer.
Número de saltos de la ruta más larga en: Number of hops of the longest route found (plant → DC → ... → customer).
Ubicaciones intermedias que reciben el p: Intermediate locations that receive the product but whose outputs do not reach any customer.
Ubicaciones que reciben el producto pero: Locations that receive the product but have no configured output.
Puntaje 0-100 que mide la salud de la co: Score 0-100 measuring the health of the product network configuration. See Health Score section below.
Healthy = Health Score ≥ 80 | Acceptable: Healthy = Health Score ≥ 80 | Acceptable = ≥ 60 | Weak = ≥ 40 | Critical = < 40.
Desglose paso a paso: bonificaciones (+): Step-by-step breakdown: bonuses (+) for complete routes, multi-sourcing, multiple customers and lead times; penalties (-) for Ghost Nodes, Dead-ends, unique routes and single production source.
Número de ubicaciones de origen distinta: Number of distinct source locations that send this product in Location Source.
Número de ubicaciones de destino distint: Number of distinct destination locations that receive this product via Location Source.
Número de clientes configurados en Custo: Number of customers configured in Customer Source for this product.
Códigos de los clientes configurados en: Codes of the customers configured in Customer Source.
Sí/No — alguna ubicación destino recibe: Yes/No — some destination location receives this product from more than one source simultaneously.
Promedio de TLEADTIME de todos los arcos: Average TLEADTIME across all Location Source arcs. "—" if there are no arcs.
Promedio de CLEADTIME de todos los arcos: Average CLEADTIME across all Customer Source arcs. "—" if there are no arcs.
Plantas que producen el producto pero no: Plants that produce the product but have no route to any customer.
<strong>Valor N/A:</strong> Cuando una m: N/A value: When a metric does not apply or has no data (e.g. average TLT for a product without Location Source), the cell shows "—" with a light gray background in italics. It does not indicate an error but the absence of data for that field.
El puntaje se calcula de forma diferente: The score is calculated differently depending on the product category, because network expectations differ for each type:
+50 si hay rutas completas; +15 si múlti: +50 if there are complete routes; +15 if multiple customers; +15 if multiple routes; +20 if multiple plants.
-20 por ghost nodes; -15 por dead-ends;: -20 for ghost nodes; -15 for dead-ends; -20 for customers with a single route; -15 for single production source.
+30 si tiene PSH; +40 si tiene consumo P: +30 if it has PSH; +40 if it has PSI consumption; +20 if multiple plants; +10 if it has Location Source.
+60 si tiene Location Source; +20 si tie: +60 if it has Location Source; +20 if it has at least one intermediate destination (DC) in Location Source; +20 if it has Customer Source.
+40 si tiene Location Source; +40 si tie: +40 if it has Location Source; +40 if it has Customer Source; +20 if multiple customers.
El producto tiene al menos una ruta comp: The product has at least one complete route from a producing plant to a customer. Correct configuration.
El producto tiene producción (PSH) y arc: The product has production (PSH) and distribution arcs (Location Source) but none reaches a Customer Source — it is not delivered to any customer.
El producto tiene producción (PSH) pero: The product has production (PSH) but there are no distribution arcs (Location Source) from the plant. It leaves the plant without a configured route.
El producto tiene Customer Source config: The product has Customer Source configured but no complete route exists connecting production with that customer delivery.
El producto tiene Customer Source (entre: The product has Customer Source (customer delivery) but no Location Source (distribution). No declared source in the network.
El producto tiene Location Source pero n: The product has Location Source but no Customer Source — it never reaches any customer from the declared network.
El producto sin categoría tiene Location: The uncategorized product has Location Source but no Customer Source or PSH. Without a defined category, the absence of customer delivery is considered an error.
Mercadería con arcos de distribución (LS: Trading product with distribution (LS) and delivery (CS) arcs correctly configured.
El producto sin categoría tiene arcos de: The uncategorized product has distribution and delivery arcs but no PSH. Without a defined category, the absence of production is considered an error.
El semiterminado se produce y consume en: The semi-finished is produced and consumed at the same plant. No transfer required.
El semiterminado se produce en una plant: The semi-finished is produced at one plant and consumed as PSI at the transfer destination plant.
El semiterminado se consume en la planta: The semi-finished is consumed at the producing plant AND also transferred to another plant where it is also consumed.
El semiterminado tiene PSH en una planta: The semi-finished has PSH at a plant different from where it is consumed, but has no Location Source arc to the consuming plant.
El producto no tiene Production Source H: The product has no Production Source Header — no production source configured. For semi-finished: it is not being manufactured internally. For finished: it is categorized as a final product but has network arcs without a production recipe.
El semiterminado tiene producción pero n: The semi-finished has production but does not appear as a component in any BOM.
El insumo tiene arcos de Location Source: The input has Location Source arcs that reach at least one producing plant.
El insumo tiene Location Source pero nin: The input has Location Source but no arc reaches a producing plant — possible incomplete configuration.
El insumo tiene Location Source pero no: The input has Location Source but does not appear in any BOM as a component — supply arc without declared productive use.
El insumo no tiene ningún arco en Locati: The input has no Location Source arc — no declared source in the network.
El producto no tiene ningún arco en Loca: The product has no arc in Location Source or Customer Source — completely disconnected from the network.
La mercadería no tiene ningún arco en Lo: The trading product has no arc in Location Source or Customer Source — completely disconnected from the network.
El producto solo existe en el maestro de: The product only exists in the material master with no network activity (not in PSH, PSI, Location Source, Customer Source or Location Product).
<strong>Estados de la Red en la columna: Network States in the Observation column: When the Network State is not the OK state for the product category, its exact text also appears as the first observation in the Observation column. The OK states by category are: Finished / Uncat. = "Complete Network"; Trading = "Distribution + Delivery only"; Raw Material = "Complete Supply"; Semi-finished = any of the three "Semi-finished..." states. All other states indicate a problem and appear in Observation with the same text.
El producto tiene PSH y Location Source: The product has PSH and Location Source but no arc reaches a customer. The Network State is "No Customer Delivery" and that text appears in Observation.
Verificar que exista al menos un arco de: Verify that at least one Customer Source arc exists for this product, or that the Location Source network connects production with some location that has Customer Source.
El producto tiene PSH pero no tiene arco: The product has PSH but no Location Source arcs leaving the plant. The Network State is "No Distribution" and that text appears in Observation.
Crear al menos un arco en Location Sourc: Create at least one Location Source arc with the producing plant as LOCFR.
El producto tiene Customer Source pero n: The product has Customer Source but no complete production route reaches it. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Revisar los arcos de Location Source e i: Review the Location Source arcs and identify the disconnected node preventing production from reaching the customer delivery arc.
El producto tiene Customer Source pero n: The product has Customer Source but no Location Source. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Configurar los arcos de Location Source: Configure the Location Source arcs that bring the product from its source to the customer delivery location.
El producto tiene Location Source pero n: The product has Location Source but no Customer Source. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Configurar los arcos de Customer Source: Configure the Customer Source arcs so the product reaches some customer.
El producto sin categoría tiene Location: The uncategorized product has Location Source but no Customer Source or PSH. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Asignar una categoría al tipo de materia: Assign a category to the material type in the configuration, or configure the corresponding Customer Source and Production Source Header arcs.
El producto sin categoría tiene arcos de: The uncategorized product has distribution (LS) and delivery (CS) arcs but no PSH. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Asignar la categoría correcta al tipo de: Assign the correct category to the material type. If it is Trading, reclassify it as trading in the material types configuration.
El producto no tiene ningún arco en Loca: The product has no arc in Location Source or Customer Source. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Revisar si el producto está activo en IB: Check whether the product is active in IBP. Configure at least one arc in Location Source or Customer Source according to its role in the chain.
La mercadería no tiene ningún arco en Lo: The trading product has no arc in Location Source or Customer Source. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Revisar si el producto está activo en IB: Check whether the product is active in IBP. Configure at least one arc in Location Source or Customer Source according to the expected distribution role.
El semiterminado se produce en una plant: The semi-finished is produced at a plant different from where it is consumed, but has no Location Source arc to the consuming plant. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Configurar el arco de Location Source de: Configure the Location Source arc from the semi-finished producing plant to the plant where it is consumed as a component.
El producto no tiene PSH. Para semitermi: The product has no PSH. For semi-finished: it is not being manufactured internally. For finished: it has network arcs but no configured production recipe. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Crear la fuente de producción (PSH con S: Create the production source (PSH with SOURCETYPE=P) in IBP, or check whether the product should be reclassified as Trading in the material types configuration.
El semiterminado tiene PSH pero no apare: The semi-finished has PSH but does not appear as a component in any BOM. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Agregar este semiterminado como componen: Add this semi-finished as a component (PSI) in the BOM of the finished product that consumes it.
El insumo no tiene ningún arco en Locati: The input has no Location Source arc. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Configurar el arco de Location Source co: Configure the Location Source arc with the supplier or source plant as LOCFR to the consuming plants.
El insumo tiene Location Source pero nin: The input has Location Source but no arc reaches a producing plant. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Revisar si falta el arco final en Locati: Check if the final Location Source arc connecting the source with the plant consuming the input is missing.
El insumo tiene Location Source pero no: The input has Location Source but does not appear in any BOM. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Verificar si el insumo está vigente y si: Verify whether the input is active and whether it should be added as a PSI component in some production recipe.
El producto solo existe en el maestro de: The product only exists in the material master — has no network activity. Appears verbatim in Observation.
Verificar si el producto es obsoleto o s: Check whether the product is obsolete or if its network participation is missing (PSH, Location Source, Customer Source or Location Product).
La ubicación X recibe el producto pero t: Location X receives the product but all its outputs end in a dead-end — it does not reach any customer.
Revisar la configuración de arcos salien: Review the outbound arc configuration of location X in Location Source. An arc to the next node or to a Customer Source may be missing.
La ubicación X recibe el producto por Lo: Location X receives the product via Location Source but has no configured output — the product arrives and cannot continue.
Agregar el arco de salida faltante en Lo: Add the missing outbound arc in Location Source or Customer Source from location X, or check whether that node is the final destination (in which case a Customer Source is missing).
La planta X produce este producto pero n: Plant X produces this product but has no route reaching any customer — production with no reachable market.
Revisar arcos de distribución desde la p: Review distribution arcs from plant X in Location Source. The initial arc from the plant to the first distribution node may be missing.
Se detectó un ciclo en la red: el produc: A cycle was detected in the network: the product can circulate indefinitely between these locations without reaching any customer.
Revisar los arcos de Location Source ent: Review the Location Source arcs among the cycle locations and identify which is configured in the wrong direction.
La planta X produce este producto pero s: Plant X produces this product but its PLEADTIME is 0 or empty. IBP plans instantaneous production.
Ingresar el PLEADTIME real en días en el: Enter the real PLEADTIME in days in the Production Source Header for plant X and this product.
El arco de transferencia X→Y tiene TLEAD: The transfer arc X→Y has TLEADTIME = 0 or empty. IBP plans instantaneous transfers on that leg.
Ingresar el TLEADTIME real en días en el: Enter the real TLEADTIME in days in the Location Source arc X→Y for this product.
El arco de entrega X→Y (hacia cliente) t: The delivery arc X→Y (to customer) has CLEADTIME = 0 or empty. IBP plans instantaneous deliveries on that leg.
Ingresar el CLEADTIME real en días en el: Enter the real CLEADTIME in days in the Customer Source arc X→Y for this product.
El producto está en PSH o en Location So: The product is in PSH or in Location Source but is not enabled in Location Product at some network location.
Habilitar el producto en Location Produc: Enable the product in Location Product for the locations where it actively participates in the network.
El producto tiene Customer Source (entre: The product has Customer Source (customer delivery) but is not enabled in Customer Product for that customer.
Habilitar la combinación producto+client: Enable the product+customer combination in Customer Product in IBP.
Red desconectada: arcos LS y CS no compa: Disconnected network: LS and CS arcs do not share locations
Los arcos de distribución (Location Sour: Distribution arcs (Location Source) and delivery arcs (Customer Source) have no location in common — the network is split into two disconnected fragments.
Revisar que al menos una ubicación apare: Verify that at least one location appears both in Location Source (as destination) and in Customer Source (as delivery source).
Destino(s) de transferencia sin consumo: Transfer destination(s) without PSI consumption: X, Y
El semiterminado se transfiere a las ubi: The semi-finished is transferred to locations X, Y but in none of them is it consumed as an ingredient in any recipe.
La red tiene más de 50.000 rutas posible: The network has more than 50,000 possible routes — they were partially processed to avoid system blocking.

Solo en maestro, sin uso en red: Only in master, no network use
